message:
fix(tests): update analytics CLI tests for fully-implemented subcommands

The analytics_subcommands_emit_uniform_json_envelope test had a stale
else-branch asserting data.status == "not_implemented" for tools, models,
cost, rebuild, and validate — all of which are now fully implemented.
Replaced with per-command data structure validation.

Also fixed analytics_rebuild_json_envelope_structure which expected JSON
on stdout when the isolated temp dir has no DB (error goes to stderr).
Added DB-lock tolerance for rebuild in multi-agent environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
